hero.question: Wizards vs. Nets
hero.prob_take: At 40.5%, Wizards money is basically a coin flip with a slight lean, which means the market is saying this is genuinely toss-up basketball with zero consensus on which team wins. The +7.5 point swing in 24 hours signals sharp money moved in, so either Wizards got healthier, Nets fell apart, or someone just hammered it on technicals, but low volume at 109K means this price can still move hard on the next news cycle.

daily_take.headline: Wizards Just Became Sharper Than The Line Says They Are
daily_take.deck: Wizards jumped 7.5 points in 24 hours on modest volume, signaling smart money believes Washington's improving roster gives them real edge against Brooklyn. The market's only priced them at 40.5% despite recent roster moves and the Nets' ongoing dysfunction. If you're seeing something in the Wizards' lineup or matchup data that justifies the bump, this is your spot to pile in before casual money catches up.
